topics.name: audit planning
topics.description: Defining the scope, objectives, resourcing, and schedule of an internal or external audit.

topics.name: audit evidence
topics.description: The documentation and data an auditor collects and evaluates to support audit conclusions.

topics.name: audit findings
topics.description: Deficiencies or observations identified during an audit that require management attention.

topics.name: remediation tracking
topics.description: Tracking corrective action plans for audit findings through to closure.
